description: Executes npm test against the emitted test.spec.ts for a compiled capability. Verifies definition hash integrity and golden input validation. A failing test blocks progression to membrane proposal. Maximum 3 self-correction attempts before emitting a failed_compilation receipt and stopping.

attempt_number.description: Which self-correction attempt this is. Must be 1, 2, or 3. If 3 fails, emit failed_compilation receipt and stop.

self_correction_context.description: Optional. The error output from a previous failed attempt, passed so ZAK can reason about the correction needed.
